info.title: nuget-skills
info.description: Discover and load AI coding skills bundled with NuGet packages. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Windsurf, Cline, and Goose.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Discover and load AI coding skills bundled with NuGet packages

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install nuget-skills discovery for AI coding agents

options.name: --project-level
options.description: Install to the current project directory instead of globally [default: False]

options.name: --agent
options.description: Comma-separated list of agents (claude, cursor, copilot, codex, windsurf, cline, goose, all). Auto-detects if omitted.

options.name: --no-remote
options.description: Disable remote skill discovery (checking package source repos) [default: False]

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan NuGet packages for bundled skills (local + remote)

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to a solution or project file

options.name: --refresh
options.description: Re-check all remote repos (ignore cache) [default: False]

commands.name: load
commands.description: Output the full skill content for a NuGet package

options.name: --version
options.description: Package version (auto-detected from project if not specified)

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to a solution or project file for version resolution

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The NuGet package ID to load the skill for

commands.name: info
commands.description: Output package metadata (repository URL, description, skill status)

options.name: --version
options.description: Package version (auto-detected from project if not specified)

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to a solution or project file for version resolution

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: The NuGet package ID to get info for

commands.name: configure
commands.description: Configure which package skills to load for this project

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to a solution or project file

options.name: --reset
options.description: Remove the project configuration file [default: False]

options.name: --list
options.description: Show current configuration without modifying [default: False]

options.name: --add
options.description: Add a package to the whitelist (non-interactive)

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove a package from the whitelist (non-interactive)

arguments.name: package
arguments.description: Clear cache for a specific package (clears all if omitted)
